change_summary: Fixed price backfill 98.9% failure rate caused by yfinance 1.1.0 breaking change. Added auto_adjust=False to restore Adj Close column, unified download path, inter-batch delays, retry logic, and failure alerting.
root_cause: yfinance 1.1.0 changed auto_adjust default from False to True, removing the Adj Close column. build_price_rows accessed row['Adj Close'] -> KeyError. The except KeyError in the batch loop silently caught this as 'No data returned', masking the real error. 5266/5327 tickers (98.9%) failed from batch 1 onward — NOT rate limiting.
